overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a futuristic city sidewalk at dusk. The character passes neon-lit skyscrapers, a gas station structure, and navigates through an intersection with traffic lights while vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial street with towering arcology buildings

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the sidewalk past a lamppost with the 07 tower building on the left

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscraper with large white 07 signage illuminated on the facade
large colorful digital screen displaying advertisements in the distance
tall modern street light pole with horizontal lamp fixture
wide asphalt road with multiple lanes for vehicle traffic

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk in a futuristic city at dusk. The prominent 07 tower building rises on the left with illuminated signage, while a digital billboard glows in the distance. Sparse vegetation lines the right side of the path as vehicles pass occasionally on the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching gas station with elevated highway overpass

events.description: pedestrian in red pants walks past in the opposite direction on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk as the gas station structure becomes visible ahead on the right

notable_agents.action: walking past the camera in the opposite direction wearing red pants and dark jacket

entered.detail: futuristic gas station with orange metal framework and illuminated signage
raised concrete highway overpass structure running parallel to the street

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as the gas station structure with its distinctive orange framework comes into view on the right, beneath an elevated highway overpass. The 07 tower recedes into the left background. A pedestrian in red pants walks past in the opposite direction, and traffic density increases slightly on the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection approach with traffic control infrastructure

events.description: approaching and passing under the traffic light gantry at the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking toward the intersection under the elevated highway, approaching the traffic lights

entered.detail: overhead metal gantry structure supporting traffic lights spanning the road
road sign displaying speed limit of 40 mounted on a pole

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a major intersection marked by a traffic light gantry spanning the multi-lane road. The gas station structure looms larger on the right as the character draws closer. A speed limit sign becomes visible on the left as the character walks beneath the traffic lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: crossing through intersection with commercial signage

events.description: character turns slightly left while continuing forward through the intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating through the intersection with a slight left turn, passing the Sequoia street sign

entered.detail: street sign with Sequoia text mounted on a pole at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the intersection, passing the Sequoia street sign on the left while the traffic light gantry falls behind. The gas station recedes into the distance on the right as the character continues along the sidewalk with a slight left turn, maintaining course through the futuristic urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a futuristic city sidewalk at dusk, transitioning from the shadow of a towering skyscraper toward an industrial transit hub. It begins with the character walking past the illuminated signage of the 07 tower on the left, while a digital billboard glows in the distance and sparse vegetation lines the path. As the character advances, the tower recedes into the background and the scene opens up to reveal a gas station with a distinctive orange framework beneath an elevated highway overpass. The camera continues forward as a pedestrian in red pants passes in the opposite direction, while the traffic on the adjacent multi-lane road grows denser.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a futuristic sidewalk as the character navigates through a busy urban intersection. It begins with the character approaching a major crossing, where a traffic light gantry spans the multi-lane road and a gas station structure looms large on the right. As the character walks beneath the lights, a speed limit sign appears on the left before the camera moves forward into the heart of the intersection. The scene then shifts as the traffic gantry falls behind and the character passes a Sequoia street sign, while the gas station recedes into the distance. Finally, the camera follows a slight left turn along the sidewalk, maintaining a steady course through the neon-lit city environment.
